title: improve podman commit documentation and error messages
body:
document --format|-f in the commit man page.  also, improve the error
message when user tries to use -m with the oci image format.

Resolves: 765

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM once the docker vs Docker issue is resolved.
